expect: GAP-3 shared work coordination protocol: consensus mechanism for who works on what across swarm instances.
actual: GAP-3 Phase 1 IMPLEMENTED. 3 new bulletin commands: lane-announce, lane-check, lane-inbox. Conflict detection via _scan_lane_conflicts(). Protocol follows claim.py pattern at inter-swarm granularity. Regex fix: [^\n]+? prevents DOTALL cross-entry bleeding. Tested: lane-inbox correctly shows active announcements, lane-check detects frontier conflicts.
diff: Expected full GAP-3: got Phase 1 (bulletin commands + conflict detection). Key insight: GAP-3 is structurally identical to intra-swarm concurrency (claim.py + SWARM-LANES), transmitted via bulletin instead of shared filesystem.
